what_changed: Validated direct EngineReadyRequest estimated_gpu_bytes values as non-negative integers.
Rejected GPU byte multiplier values whose float conversion overflows.
Rejected non-finite estimated GPU byte products before converting them to integers.
pr-evidence/engine-gpu-estimate-validati.why: GPU byte estimates feed serving engine handoff records and admission accounting. Validating direct estimates and overflow paths prevents malformed or non-finite values from reaching vLLM/SGLang integration boundaries.
